videos.headline: Hayden Reed caps off Army's 16-play drive with TD
videos.description: Hayden Reed punches in the one-yard touchdown to give Army the early lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Hayden Reed caps off Army's 16-play drive with TD) 2023/09/15 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jakobi Buchanan finds the end zone to extend Army's lead
videos.description: Jakobi Buchanan follows his blockers and finds the end zone to give Army a 14-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jakobi Buchanan finds the end zone to extend Army's lead) 2023/09/15 ESHEET

videos.headline: Robert Henry stumbles in for the UTSA TD
videos.description: Robert Henry breaks free and finds the end zone for UTSA, cutting into Army's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Robert Henry stumbles in for the UTSA TD) 2023/09/15 ESHEET

videos.headline: UTSA scores on miraculous Hail Mary just before half
videos.description: Eddie Lee Marburger connects with Tykee Ogle-Kellogg on 46-yard Hail Mary play just before halftime.
